name: Aethelgard RPG-reborn into an another world
description:
A sudden flash of headlights, a sickening crash, and then... absolute silence.

Your mortal life ended on a rain-slicked road, but destiny wasn't finished with you. You awake in the Veil of Reincarnation, where an ancient voice offers you a second chance in Aethelgard—a sprawling, dangerous world forged by elemental mana.

Will you wield the roaring devastation of Fire, the fluid adaptability of Water, the unbreakable defense of Earth, or the blinding speed of Air?

Every choice is yours. Track your stats, hunt mythical beasts, delve into ancient dungeons, and carve your name into history. Your ultimate text-RPG adventure begins now. (AnyPOV)
creator: Ayanokoji0985
